第3格

第4格

第5格

第6格

配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
第7格
标题：6. 脑子停不下来就写下来

配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
第8格
标题：7. 固定上床时间
正文：每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。
配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
第9格
标题：8. 试试深呼吸放松法
正文：吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。

final_prompt.prompt:
生成一张适合小红书发布的 3:4 竖版九宫格海报，整体为 3列 × 3行 排版，九个宫格边界清晰，方便后期直接切割成 9 张单图发布。整体风格干净、高级、统一，适合女性向健康生活方式内容，具有小红书爆款封面气质。画面要求 信息排版清晰、文字大、可读性强、留白舒服、配色温柔治愈。

整体视觉风格：
奶油白、浅米色、淡燕麦色、浅焦糖色为主色调，搭配少量深棕色文字，ins风、治愈感、睡眠疗愈主题，简约排版，轻拟物插画点缀，可加入枕头、月亮、星星、热牛奶、香薰、书本、眼罩、窗帘、床铺等元素。整体像专业新媒体设计图，字体工整，适合做知识科普类小红书九宫格。
排版要求：

整张图必须是标准九宫格构图，切分后每一格都能独立成图

每个宫格内容完整居中，不要把标题或正文压在分割线附近
每个格子之间保留明显间隔或细边框，保证裁切后不影响阅读
所有文字使用中文，清晰易读，不要乱码，不要英文
每个宫格都像独立的小红书图文卡片，但视觉风格保持统一
画面精致、真实、自然，不要廉价营销感，不要过度花哨
九宫格具体内容：

第1格（封面）
大标题：让你倒头就睡的8个 tips
副标题：失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏
封面视觉最吸睛，适合做首图，加入柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩等治愈睡眠元素，标题突出，排版高级。

第2格
标题：1. 睡前1小时别玩手机
正文：蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。
配图元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情的小插画
第3格
标题：2. 睡前把灯光调暗
正文：暖光环境能帮助身体进入“准备睡觉”的状态。
配图元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
第4格
标题：3. 房间温度别太高
正文：稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。
配图元素：空调、温度计、被子
第5格
标题：4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡
正文：咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。
配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号

第6格
标题：5. 睡前洗个热水澡
正文：能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。
配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
第7格
标题：6. 脑子停不下来就写下来
正文：把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。
配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
第8格
标题：7. 固定上床时间
正文：每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。
配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
第9格
标题：8. 试试深呼吸放松法
正文：吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。
底部小字：收藏这组，今晚试试看
配图元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星

画质要求：
高清，高级排版，杂志感，真实可发布，新媒体运营审美，小红书爆款图文风格，文字布局规整，适合直接切图。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster — a 3×3 nine-grid vertical layout designed for Chinese social media platform 小红书 (Xiaohongshu), formatted at 3:4 ratio so the full image can be sliced into 9 equal individual cards after export.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic illustration, ins-style healing aesthetic, light skeuomorphic illustration accents, magazine-grade layout, warm minimalist new-media design
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row grid, each cell separated by a visible thin border or clear gap, all content centered within each cell, no text or illustration bleeding across grid lines; every cell reads as a self-contained card
Subject: nine individual sleep-tip cards unified by a single visual language — cream white, light beige, oat, and pale caramel as dominant tones, deep brown for all body text, soft healing sleep-wellness theme
Scene/backdrop: flat clean background per cell, overall palette feels warm, airy, and uncluttered with generous white space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light atmosphere, gentle and therapeutic, no harsh shadows, no flashy gradients
Color palette: cream white (#FAF7F2) and oat beige (#EDE0CE) as base, pale caramel (#D4A97A) as accent, deep brown (#3B2A1A) for text; palette is consistent across all nine cells
Materials/textures: light skeuomorphic illustration style with subtle soft shadows on objects; smooth matte surfaces; no glossy or plastic feel
Text (verbatim): 
Cell 1 — large headline: "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips"，副标题: "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏"
Cell 2 — title: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机"，body: "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。"
Cell 3 — title: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗"，body: "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。"
Cell 4 — title: "3. 房间温度别太高"，body: "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。"
Cell 5 — title: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡"，body: "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。"
Cell 6 — title: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡"，body: "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。"
Cell 7 — title: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来"，body: "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。"
Cell 8 — title: "7. 固定上床时间"，body: "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。"
Cell 9 — title: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法"，body: "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。"，footer small text: "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Illustration elements per cell: Cell 1 — soft bed, crescent moon, pillow, sleep mask; Cell 2 — phone, moon, sleepy face doodle; Cell 3 — bedside lamp, warm yellow glow, curtains; Cell 4 — air conditioner, thermometer, blanket; Cell 5 — coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol; Cell 6 — bathroom steam, towel, hot water; Cell 7 — notebook, fountain pen, small desk lamp; Cell 8 — clock, moon, bed; Cell 9 — breathing rhythm line, closed-eye figure, stars
Constraints: all text must be Chinese characters only — no English, no garbled characters, no romanization; font must be clean, geometric, highly legible, large enough to read on a phone screen; grid lines must be clearly visible to guide cutting; each cell must be fully self-contained with no cross-cell bleed; no cheap marketing feel, no excessive decoration
Avoid: English text anywhere, garbled or corrupted characters, text placed near grid borders, overlapping cross-cell illustrations, neon colors, heavy drop shadows, cluttered layouts, watermarks, stock-photo collage aesthetic

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, handheld-feel smartphone editorial in the spirit of award-winning street photojournalism, sharp details with natural lens rendering
Composition: wide horizontal frame, strict 16:9 aspect ratio, deep cityscape receding into the distance, generous negative sky space in upper zone for text overlay, pedestrians in mid-ground as silhouettes or motion-blurred figures
Subject: bustling city street at dusk — commuters walking briskly, neon signs beginning to glow, towering skyscrapers reflecting warm sunset light on glass facades
Scene/backdrop: urban downtown at golden hour transitioning to blue hour, street level looking outward toward the skyline, distant high-rises bathed in orange-pink sunset glow, foreground wet pavement or crosswalk

Color palette: warm amber and burnt orange in the sky anchoring the palette, cool blue-purple shadows in the street, punctuated by scattered neon reds and whites from storefronts

Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" · "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" · "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: "城市里的安静时刻" must appear as a bold, prominent headline (黑体 or modern sans-serif) in a visually dominant position; "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as a subtitle beneath it; "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as a small watermark at bottom-right corner; all three text elements must be legible against the image
Avoid: artificial HDR halo, over-saturated toy-camera look, studio lighting feel, symmetrical tourist postcard composition, generic stock photo flatness, deformed human figures

final_prompt.prompt:
请根据【中国少数名族服饰】自动生成一张“博物馆图鉴式中文拆解信息图”。
 
要求整张图兼具真实写实主视觉、结构拆解、中文标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义和核心特征总结。你需要根据【中国少数名族服饰】自动判断最合适的主体对象、服饰体系、器物结构、时代风格、关键部件、材质工艺、颜色方案与版式结构，用户无需再提供其他信息。
 
整体风格应为：国家博物馆展板、历史服饰图鉴、文博专题信息图，而不是普通海报、古风写真、电商详情页或动漫插画。背景采用米白、绢纸白、浅茶色等纸张质感，整体高级、克制、专业、可收藏。
 
版式固定为：
- 顶部：中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
- 左侧：结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，并配局部特写
- 右上：材质 / 工艺 /   质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
- 右中：纹样 / 色彩 /   寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
- 底部：穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
 
若主题适合人物展示，则以真实人物全身站姿为中央主体；若更适合器物或单体结构，则改为中心主体拆解图，但整体仍保持完整中文信息图形式。所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读，不要乱码、错字、英文或拼音。重点突出真实结构、材质差异、文化说明与图鉴气质。
 
避免：海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感、乱标注、错结构、糊字、假材质、过度装饰。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade Chinese infographic poster presenting a detailed structural breakdown of traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume (中国少数民族服饰), styled as an authoritative natural history museum exhibit panel or historical costume atlas.

Style/medium: photorealistic illustration blended with technical diagram draftsmanship; ink-and-wash academic illustration in the manner of Chinese national museum exhibit boards (国家博物馆展板); flat archival paper texture background in warm off-white / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色; no poster gloss, no commercial sheen
Composition: full vertical infographic layout; central full-body standing female figure in complete ethnic minority costume occupying the middle axis; left column for structural annotation callouts; right column split into upper material/craft swatches and lower pattern/color/meaning panel; bottom band for assembly sequence diagram and key feature summary; generous margins, grid-aligned, museum-catalog spacing
Subject: a carefully chosen representative ethnic minority costume — select the most visually rich and culturally distinctive ensemble (e.g. 苗族盛装 or 彝族传统服饰) with full headdress, upper garment, skirt or trousers, sash, embroidered collar, silver ornaments, and footwear; figure in neutral standing pose, facing slightly three-quarter, full body visible head to toe
Scene/backdrop: clean 绢纸白 / 米白 archival paper texture background with subtle aged-paper grain; no environmental scene; faint grid or registration marks acceptable as museum-panel detail
Lighting/mood: even diffused studio lighting, no dramatic shadows; scholarly, restrained, collectible; the mood of a Qing-dynasty illustrated compendium or a Smithsonian textile catalog
Color palette: warm off-white as dominant ground; the costume itself carries the primary chromatic weight — deep indigo, vermillion, silver, and embroidery accent colors drawn from the chosen ethnic tradition; annotation lines and text in dark ink brown or charcoal; color swatch panel uses isolated chips with Chinese labels
Materials/textures: visible woven textile grain on garment surfaces; embroidery thread dimensionality; hammered silver surface on ornaments; hand-stitched seam detail; all textures photorealistic and differentiated — no plastic, no flat fill
Text (verbatim): layout must contain the following Chinese text blocks exactly as positioned —
  顶部主标题区：「中国少数民族服饰图鉴」（大字）+ 副标题（所选族群名称 + 服饰类别）+ 两至三行导语简介；
  左侧结构标注区：中文引线标注，标出头饰、领襟、上衣、腰带、裙摆/裤脚、绣片、银饰、鞋履等关键部件名称，每条引线末端附简短说明文字；
  右上材质工艺区：3–4 个真实纹理小样方块，每块附「材质名称 + 工艺说明」中文文字；
  右中纹样色彩区：主色板色块（4–6色）+ 每色附中文色名与文化寓意；纹样样本图案 2–3 个，附中文纹样名称与象征解释；
  底部流程图区：穿着顺序或构成层次流程图，步骤编号用中文数字，每步附简短中文说明；核心特征总结栏，3–5条要点，简体中文，规整排列
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese (简体中文), legible, correctly written, no romanization, no English, no garbled characters; annotation leader lines must point accurately to the correct garment part; layout must be a complete self-contained infographic — every zone described above must be present and populated; the central figure must be photorealistic, not illustrated in anime, cosplay, or commercial fashion style; material swatches must show genuine textile/metal texture differentiation
Avoid: poster aesthetics, studio portrait feel, e-commerce product page layout, anime or cartoon rendering, cosplay styling, inaccurate structural callouts, blurred or garbled Chinese text, fake or uniform textures, over-decoration, English labels, pinyin annotations, dramatic cinematic lighting

final_prompt.prompt: 做一个杭州市4天3晚的旅游地区，要以真实的杭州地图为背景主线，三折叠景区册子图片,著名景区在册子上要有地标特色，悬浮在卡纸上。。旅游攻略模仿（可优化) 第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南 ‌路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 ⏰ 建议时间：7:30出发，避开人流高峰 ✨ 必玩亮点 ‌断桥日出：7点前抵达，独享空无一人的水墨画意境 孤山秘境：西泠印社的竹林窗景，秒出古风大片 雷峰塔俯瞰：登顶看西湖全景，傍晚时分金光穿塔超震撼  午餐推荐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁），人均150元 ⚠️ 避坑指南：别坐环湖电瓶车！租共享单车更自由（每小时5元）  第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵 ‌路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城  玩法升级 ‌灵隐寺祈福：摸“咫尺西天”照壁沾福气，请网红十八籽手串（46元） 法喜寺机位：最高殿阁俯拍黄墙黛瓦，求姻缘超灵验 宋城必看：《宋城千古情》演出（贵宾席320元），体验全息投影+水上飞人    拍照TIP：法喜寺出口的江南驿古道，光影绝美  晚餐推荐：素描餐厅（榴莲烤鸡+焦糖布丁），人均90元  第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人 ‌路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径  小众玩法 ‌九溪踩水：穿凉鞋踏过石板溪流，感受25℃的绿野仙踪 龙井问茶：村民家品明前龙井（50元/杯），亲手炒茶体验（需预约）   云栖竹径：寻找《卧虎藏龙》同款竹海，偶遇千年枫香树    交通贴士：九溪入口乘摆渡车（8元）直达九溪烟树  晚餐推荐：茶人村（私房桂鱼+香芋煲），人均120元  第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面 ‌方案A：运河文艺线 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 必体验：中国伞/刀剪剑博物馆（免费）、水上巴士1号线（3元） 方案B：西溪湿地轻奢游 周家村→深潭口（非诚勿扰取景地）→氦气球俯瞰湿地（180元）  伴手礼推荐：   南宋胡记荷花酥（38元/盒） 万事利丝绸方巾（150-300元）  住宿红黑榜   ✅ 西湖边优选：杭州君悦酒店（湖景房超绝）、青芝坞民宿（人均200元） ❌ 避雷区域：火车站周边老破小，隔音差且价格虚高  交通干货 地铁支付宝领“杭州地铁乘车码” 萧山机场→西湖：地铁1号线直达（7元/50分钟） 灵隐寺专线：龙翔桥地铁站乘7W路（5元）

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial infographic trifold brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism itinerary, designed as a physical tri-fold leaflet floating above cardstock.

Style/medium: flat editorial illustration meets photorealistic map overlay; trifold brochure print design with a real Hangzhou city map as the dominant background thread; landmark icons rendered in a refined travel-guide illustration style with subtle depth shadows suggesting the booklet floats above a cream cardstock surface
Composition: three-panel trifold layout (left panel / center panel / right panel) spread horizontally; each panel contains a distinct day-cluster of attractions; the real Hangzhou geographic map underlays all three panels as a continuous cartographic base; famous landmarks rendered as illustrated 3D icons pinned at their true map positions; generous white margins on each panel; the entire folded booklet casts a soft drop shadow onto the cardstock beneath
Subject: trifold tourism brochure for "杭州市4天3晚旅游攻略"; landmark icons include 断桥残雪, 雷峰塔, 孤山/西泠印社, 苏堤, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 宋城, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 西溪湿地; each icon carries a small Chinese label
Scene/backdrop: the booklet floats above a warm cream/ivory cardstock sheet; background is a clean studio surface with soft ambient light; no busy clutter outside the brochure
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead light with a gentle warm fill from the lower right; the floating brochure casts a realistic layered drop shadow on the cardstock; mood is refined, inviting, and culturally rich
Color palette: Hangzhou celadon green and West Lake blue as primary brand colors; warm terracotta accent for day-number badges; cream/ivory for panel backgrounds; black for body text; gold for landmark icon outlines
Materials/textures: matte coated paper texture on brochure panels; slight paper curl at trifold edges suggesting physical print; cardstock beneath has a subtle linen grain
Text (verbatim): "杭州市4天3晚旅游攻略" as the cover headline; day labels "第一天：西湖经典游" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "第四天：文艺收官"; route stops listed in small body text per panel including 断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 / 灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 / 九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 / 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街 and 西溪湿地; key callouts: 楼外楼 人均150元 / 《宋城千古情》贵宾席320元 / 龙井问茶50元/杯 / 氦气球俯瞰湿地180元; footer strip: 南宋胡记荷花酥38元/盒 · 万事利丝绸方巾150-300元
Constraints: the real Hangzhou street/district map must be legible as a cartographic base layer across all three panels; landmark icons must be positioned at geographically accurate locations on the map; trifold fold lines must be clearly visible; brochure must read as a coherent physical print object floating above cardstock; all Chinese text must be correctly rendered and legible
Avoid: generic tourist clip-art; fantasy or non-existent map geography; blurry or garbled Chinese characters; flat 2D icon sheets without map context; overcrowded panels that lose readability; drop shadow so heavy it obscures the cardstock texture

  Day 2 panel — Zen & Song dynasty: 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城; highlights: 咫尺西天 wall, 十八籽手串 (46元), 法喜寺 yellow-wall rooftop angle, 《宋城千古情》 (贵宾席320元); dinner: 素描餐厅 (人均90元)
  Day 3 panel — Tea hills & bamboo: 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径; highlights: stone-stream wading, 明前龙井 tasting (50元/杯), 《卧虎藏龙》 bamboo sea, 千年枫香树; shuttle bus (8元); dinner: 茶人村 (人均120元)
  Day 4 panel — two options: 方案A 运河文艺线 (拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺, 中国伞/刀剪剑博物馆免费, 水上巴士1号线3元) / 方案B 西溪湿地 (周家村 / 深潭口 / 氦气球180元); souvenirs: 南宋胡记荷花酥38元/盒, 万事利丝绸方巾150-300元
Scene/backdrop: real Hangzhou geographic map base showing West Lake, Lingyin area, Jiuxi valley, and Grand Canal routes connecting all day-panels
Lighting/mood: bright, warm, cheerful — Xiaohongshu travel-attack tonality; Day 1 panel hints at golden-hour glow; Day 3 panel hints at misty green bamboo light
Color palette: warm earth tones with lake-blue (西湖) and bamboo-green (九溪/云栖) accents, map-beige base

final_prompt.prompt:
生成一张韩国咖啡馆风格的时尚咖啡和甜点的照片。像是用智能手机拍摄的、适合发到Instagram的照片。没有人物。然后，观察照片中出现的元素，并为每个元素添加有意义的手绘注释。
【描写规则】
・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条
・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀
・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线
・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导
【文本规则】
・日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）
・简短，像自言自语一样的评论
・语气是“日记・一言・情感寄托”
【评论生成规则】
・饮料 → 味道・温度・心情（例：清爽、温柔的甜味）
・食物 → 口感・美味（例：湿润、最高）
・空间 → 氛围（例：放松、美好时光）
・整体 → 一言总结（例：幸福过头了～）
【装饰】
・蒸汽、闪闪发光、心形、小表情符号等适度添加
・不过度，留出“空白”
【完成风格】
・Instagram故事风、杂志的粗糙笔记风   ・时尚且轻松的氛围

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of Korean café-style fashionable coffee and desserts, no people, styled for Instagram, then overlaid with hand-drawn annotation illustrations in white pen with Japanese handwritten commentary.

Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic, Korean café flat-lay / slight overhead angle, warm and airy Instagram-ready editorial; annotation layer rendered as white-pen hand-drawn sketch overlay — single-stroke style, slightly rough and uneven lines as if drawn in one continuous motion
Composition: overhead or slight 3/4 angle flat-lay, generous negative space around hero items, natural breathing room between elements to allow annotation placement without crowding
Subject: artfully arranged coffee drink (latte or dalgona-style) and 2–3 dessert items (e.g. financier, tart, or soft cookie) on a ceramic plate, set on a light marble or linen café table surface — no people, no hands
Scene/backdrop: Korean minimalist café table surface, soft natural window light, muted neutral background (white, cream, or pale grey)
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural daylight from one side, gentle shadows, warm and intimate mood — no harsh flash
Color palette: warm cream and white as base, muted terracotta or dusty rose as accent from food items, white annotation lines contrast cleanly against the scene
Materials/textures: ceramic matte surface, linen cloth texture, glossy coffee crema, soft powdered sugar dusting visible
Text (verbatim): hand-drawn white-pen annotations in Japanese handwriting (7 parts hiragana, 3 parts simple kanji), short diary-like one-liners per element — drink annotation: taste/temperature/mood (e.g.「やさしい甘さ♡」); food annotation: texture/deliciousness (e.g.「しっとり、さいこう」); space annotation: atmosphere (e.g.「ゆったりじかん」); overall caption: one-line summary (e.g.「しあわせすぎた〜☁️」); annotations connected to objects via arrows or dashed guide lines; decorative accents: small steam wisps above coffee, subtle sparkle marks ✦, tiny heart ♡, small emoji-style faces — used sparingly with intentional white space preserved
Constraints: annotation overlay must feel hand-drawn and organic, not digital-font; white space between annotations is mandatory — do not crowd; no human figures or hands anywhere in frame; Instagram Stories aspect ratio feel within the composition
Avoid: digital clean vector lines for annotations, crowded or over-decorated layout, harsh studio lighting, people or body parts, watermarks, generic stock-photo flatlay clichés
